nasb.text: Between the passes by which Jonathan sought to cross over to the Philistines’ garrison, there was a sharp crag on the one side and a sharp crag on the other side, and the name of the one was Bozez, and the name of the other Seneh.

esv.text: Within the passes, by which Jonathan sought to go over to the Philistine garrison, there was a rocky crag on the one side and a rocky crag on the other side. The name of the one was Bozez, and the name of the other Seneh.

cnv.text: 約拿單設法要經過那個隘口到非利士人的駐軍那裡去，隘口的兩邊各有一個山峰，一個名叫播薛，另一個名叫西尼。

ccb.text: 约拿单到非利士驻军那里需要经过一个隘口，隘口两边的山峰一个叫播薛，一个叫西尼，
